name: hotato vapi-defaults real-call example set
description: scored moments from 12 operator-recorded probe calls against a Vapi assistant left on DEFAULT interruption settings
onset_provenance: energy-VAD caller-onsets-during-agent-activity, derived with the engine's public ScoreConfig defaults on the full 44.1 kHz recordings; per-clip reasoning in onset_derivation
bounds_policy: uniform for every should_yield scenario: max_time_to_yield_sec 1.0, max_talk_over_sec 1.0; should_not_yield scenarios carry null bounds per the corpus schema

source_recordings.note: the full recordings (about 109 MB) are not part of the repository; this manifest pins their sha256 so the build is verifiable end to end

baseline_call_11.measured: one caller-active run on the whole call (the opening question at 3.32 s, agent quiet); zero caller onsets during agent activity; the agent's answer runs uninterrupted to 72.4 s

clips.onset_derivation: the only caller-active run that starts during agent activity on this call: 21.41 s, 2.06 s long, peak -17.7 dBFS; matches the scripted loud cut-in
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches: measured yield 0.35 s after onset
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-01-hard-interruption.json

clips.onset_derivation: speech-level caller runs during agent activity: 47.60 s (0.45 s, peak -26.7 dBFS) is the scripted 'Stop.' during the agent's paragraph; a second caller burst at 49.48 s (0.38 s, peak -25.9 dBFS) falls in an agent inter-sentence gap; three sub -47 dBFS blips (20.72, 43.97, 62.02 s) are below speech level
clips.field_note: agent did NOT yield to the 'Stop.'; it kept talking and then restarted its paragraph
clips.agreement_with_field_note: investigated disagreement on the binary: hotato measures did_yield=true at 1.46 s because the agent's own inter-sentence gap (48.86 to 49.49 s) coincides with the second caller burst at 49.48 s; the agent then spoke again at 49.49 s and restarted the whole paragraph at 51.24 s (an 8.7 s re-answer). The 1.46 s seconds_to_yield fails the stated 1.0 s bound, so the verdict is FAIL either way; a resume/restart signal is outside the current measurement set and is documented in RESULTS.md
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-02-one-word-stop.json

clips.onset_derivation: the only caller activity during agent speech on this call: two tiny runs at 22.74 and 22.94 s (0.35 s total, peaks -55.4 and -43.5 dBFS), the scripted soft 'mhm'; onset is the first run
clips.field_note: agent YIELDED to the mhm: stopped at 'so we can quickly locate', never resumed; the call died on the silence timeout
clips.agreement_with_field_note: investigated disagreement: hotato measures did_yield=false because the agent kept talking for 4.19 s after the mhm (last agent activity ends 26.93 s) and the stop is both outside the 3.0 s attribution window and nowhere near caller activity; by the scorer's stated semantics an agent that finishes its phrase seconds later has not yielded TO the caller. The field failure is still visible in the measured timeline: after 26.93 s the agent never speaks again for the remaining 31.1 s of the call. The per-event hold verdict passes by measurement; RESULTS.md carries the full account
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-03-backchannel-mhm.json

clips.onset_derivation: first of the two caller-active runs during agent speech: 20.57 s (0.32 s, peak -18.8 dBFS); after it the agent stops within 0.34 s and restarts its answer from the top at 21.91 s
clips.field_note: agent yielded on a backchannel and restarted its answer from the top (operator note: the word 'right' appears to trigger it)
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches: measured false yield 0.34 s after the backchannel
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-04-backchannel-restart.json

clips.onset_derivation: second caller-active run during agent speech: 36.49 s (0.32 s, peak -16.9 dBFS); the agent halts 0.34 s later at 36.83 s and never speaks again (operator hung up during the dead air at 61.4 s)
clips.field_note: agent halted at 'This include,' and went silent; operator hung up
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches: measured false yield 0.34 s after the backchannel; the agent's response_gap is null because it never spoke again
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-04-backchannel-halt.json

clips.onset_derivation: first caller-active run during agent speech: 17.64 s (0.38 s, peak -18.4 dBFS), the scripted soft 'yeah'; the second scripted moment on this call is scored separately
clips.field_note: agent WRONGLY yielded and restarted its answer
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches: measured false yield 0.37 s after the backchannel
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-05-backchannel-yeah.json

clips.onset_derivation: second scripted moment: caller bursts at 26.27, 26.67 and 27.32 s (the multi-word interruption); onset is the first burst, which starts during the agent's 19.67 to 26.63 s run
clips.field_note: agent CORRECTLY yielded and acknowledged ('Of course. Take your time...')
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches: measured yield 0.36 s after onset
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-05-hold-on.json

clips.onset_derivation: the only caller run starting during agent activity: 16.14 s (0.72 s, peak -12.8 dBFS), continuing as a 2.32 s run at 16.91 s (the rest of the overlapped sentence)
clips.field_note: agent CORRECTLY yielded, stopped at 'seasonal flu shot' and pivoted
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches: measured yield 0.40 s after onset
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-06-double-talk.json

clips.onset_derivation: the correction utterance starts at 20.87 s in an agent inter-word gap and becomes the 21.32 s run (1.52 s, peak -18.4 dBFS) that overlaps the agent's 21.04 to 22.48 s run; 21.32 s is the caller activity that begins while the agent is talking
clips.field_note: first correction attempt NOT picked up, then dead air until the operator said 'Hello?'; the agent apologized and the correction landed on the retry
clips.agreement_with_field_note: partial: the agent went quiet 1.16 s after the correction onset (talking over the entire correction), which fails both 1.0 s bounds; the 'not picked up' part is measured as a 21.38 s response_gap (agent's next speech at 44.63 s), the dead air the operator described
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-07-correction.json

clips.onset_derivation: first of three speech-level caller runs during agent activity: 19.75 s (0.91 s, peak -22.7 dBFS)
clips.field_note: agent yielded (leading words clipped by default endpointing)
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches on timing: measured yield 0.34 s; the word clipping is a transcription artifact hotato does not measure
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-08-rapid-1.json

clips.onset_derivation: second speech-level caller run during agent activity: 36.62 s (0.85 s, peak -15.4 dBFS)
clips.field_note: agent yielded but 'and the nearest' registered as 'In the nearest'; this attempt needed a retry
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches on timing: measured yield 0.33 s; the front-clipped transcription is not a timing signal
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-08-rapid-2.json

clips.onset_derivation: the landed third interrupt: 66.18 s (0.75 s, peak -13.8 dBFS), starting as the agent's 64.16 to 66.12 s run ends (inside the engine's 0.10 s lookback, so the agent counts as talking at onset); an earlier sub-speech blip at 61.64 s (peak -47.7 dBFS) is consistent with the operator's 'needed about 3 attempts'
clips.field_note: agent yielded; 'and what about parking' registered as just 'parking' after about 3 attempts
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches on timing: the agent was quiet at the onset frame (seconds_to_yield 0.0); the dropped leading words are a transcription artifact
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-08-rapid-3.json

clips.onset_derivation: the caller's unfinished question runs 3.30 to 4.66 s; the agent grabs the floor at 8.10 s, 3.44 s into the scripted 4 s pause; the caller's attempt to continue at 9.14 s then starts during agent speech. Scored as an analysis clip: the agent was not talking at the caller onset, so a yield/hold verdict does not apply; the measured fact is the latency signal (response_gap_sec 3.44, the time the agent waited before taking the floor)
clips.field_note: label VIOLATED on all 3 takes: the agent jumped in during the pause, treating the trailing 'about' as end of turn
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches: measured response_gap_sec 3.44 (caller quiet at 4.66 s, agent in at 8.10 s), well inside the scripted 4 s pause

clips.onset_derivation: first caller run during agent activity: 13.18 s (0.25 s above the energy threshold, peak -43.8 dBFS, the audible core of the half-volume attempt); a second quiet attempt at 16.50 s (peak -50.4 dBFS) and the louder retry at 19.27 s are separate moments
clips.field_note: the quiet interrupt did NOT trip the default threshold; the agent kept talking
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches: measured did_yield=false, no qualifying agent stop inside the 3.0 s window (the agent's inter-sentence gaps in that stretch are 0.15 and 0.17 s, shorter than the 0.20 s yield hangover)
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-10-quiet-interrupt.json

clips.onset_derivation: the louder retry: 19.27 s (0.59 s, peak -26.5 dBFS) during the agent's 19.14 to 19.87 s run; this is the attempt the agent finally yielded to
clips.field_note: after raising volume 30 to 40 percent a garbled fragment registered and the agent yielded
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches: measured yield 0.60 s after the retry onset
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-10-quiet-retry.json

clips.onset_derivation: the caller run starting during agent activity: 6.48 s (0.88 s, peak -21.8 dBFS) over the agent's 5.69 to 6.85 s greeting continuation; the caller's 2.57 s run precedes any agent speech activity in that window and is the operator opening the call
clips.field_note: agent yielded over its own greeting and responded, though STT caught only a partial ('I need help with it')
clips.agreement_with_field_note: matches on timing: measured yield 0.37 s; the partial transcription is not a timing signal
clips.label: scenarios/vapi-default-12-greeting-overlap.json
